backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend canister with CRUD operations for announcements and roster members, storing data in mutable Maps and exposing query/update methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the hero background image replacement task to HeroSection.tsx, with test ID REQ-19 and high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, style, and config file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags, manifest link, apple-touch-icon references, and service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for static assets, skipping cross-origin and API requests, and falling back to index.html for offline navigation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, and LandingPage in a full-height dark-themed wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid with icons for Discipline, Excellence, Victory, and Brotherhood.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Announcement card component that displays a formatted nanosecond timestamp, title, body excerpt, and a hover-revealed 'Read More' indicator with accent decorations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, description, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a contact section with a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the Legend X Esports title, tagline, CTA buttons, and key stats (players, tournaments, founding year).
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA button, and a responsive mobile menu with scroll-based background transition.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News and announcements section that fetches data via a custom hook and renders announcement cards with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a single player's card with their avatar image, name, and role badge, falling back to a default avatar on image load errors.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the team roster section with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, displaying a grid of PlayerCard components fetched via the useRoster hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme, and utility classes for glows, diagonal clips, and typography effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by assembling HeroSection, AboutSection, RosterSection, NewsSection, and Footer components in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports-specific color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Legend X Esports app project, including schema version, feature list, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements for a public-facing esports landing page built on the Internet Computer.
